data.title: QHSLab (OTCQB:USAQ) Reports 127% Year-Over-Year ISP Growth and Launches Q-Connect GLP-1 Support Assessment
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, the ISP reported unaudited revenue of $370,000, a significant increase from the $163,000 generated in the first quarter of 2025. This represents a notable year-over-year growth of 127%.

data.title: Russell Young Partners with Polymath to Tokenize Iconic Autographed Pelé Art Collection, Expanding Access to Blue-Chip Art Ownership
data.description: Seven exclusive pieces signed by the legendary footballer Pelé will be available for purchase on the Polymath Capital platform. The partnership between renowned artist Russell Young and Polymath will showcase these original works at FIFA's Fan Village NYC during the upcoming World Cup. The event is set to take place in April 2026, and the collaboration aims to bring together art and sports enthusiasts.

data.title: American Warrior Association and R3 Launch National Awareness Campaign for Moral Injury, Debut The Journey Unbound Documentary Series
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas on April 21, 2026, the American Warrior Association (AWA) and R3 (Respond, Restore, Resolve) unveiled a joint effort for a nationwide communication campaign aimed at raising awareness about moral injury. This initiative will include the launch of a five-part documentary series.

data.title: EZGO Takes Full Legal Ownership of Its Self-Built Changzhou Manufacturing Facility to Scale Production
data.description: In Changzhou, China, on April 21, 2026, EZGO Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: EZGO), a leading short-distance transportation solutions provider in the country, disclosed that its subsidiary, Jiangsu EZGO New Energy Technology Co., Ltd., has been granted real estate.

data.title: Cognizant and OpenAI Partner to Reshape Enterprise Software Engineering with Codex
data.description: Cognizant has been acknowledged by OpenAI for its advanced AI builder capabilities and is integrating Codex technology throughout its worldwide software engineering division. The company is collaborating with OpenAI to introduce Codex-driven development to clients spanning various industries. This initiative comes following the announcement made in Teaneck, N.J., on April 21, 2026. Cognizant, listed under the NASDAQ as (NASDAQ: [insert symbol]), is set to leverage this partnership to enhance tech offerings for its clientele.

data.title: Electro-Sensors, Inc. to be Acquired by steute Technologies
data.description: Shareholders of Electro-Sensors will be receiving a payment of $7.75 per share in cash. The company, based in Minnetonka, Minnesota, is recognized for its industrial monitoring systems. This news was announced on April 21, 2026. Electro-Sensors, Inc. is listed on the Nasdaq exchange under the ticker symbol ELSE. The acquisition is being carried out by steute Technologies GmbH & Co. KG., which is a portfolio company of Battery, an investment firm.

data.title: Carolina Facial Plastics Announces Opening of Third Charlotte Location in South End
data.description: Carolina Facial Plastics has recently opened its third office in Charlotte, North Carolina at 2825 South Boulevard, Suite 120A. The renowned practice now operates from this new location in addition to its existing sites in the area. This expansion signifies the practice's commitment to serving a wider clientele in the Charlotte region.

data.title: In the Age of AI, a Correct Answer Is No Longer Evidence of Learning
data.description: Illuminate XR emphasizes the importance of teachers having access to connected tools in order to maximize instructional time and enhance visibility into the learning process. The company based in Los Angeles stated on April 21, 2026, that as AI facilitates easier generation of classroom output, educators require tools that enable more effective instruction.AI is increasingly integrated into educational settings, providing enhanced support for educators.

data.title: Heart to Home Meals Signs Third U.S. Franchise Agreement with New Development Deal in Somerset, New Jersey
data.description: A senior meal delivery brand originating from Boston is increasing its presence in the Northeast region after experiencing growth in Raleigh and the Chicagoland area. Heart to Home Meals USA, a franchise specializing in delivering meals for seniors to promote independent living, revealed this expansion news on April 21, 2026, from Marlborough, Mass. The brand's popularity and positive reception have led to a significant increase in the number of clients served, prompting this strategic move to reach more older adults in need of convenient and nutritious meal options.

data.title: The Bird Bath Launches "Terminal," a New Veterinary Market Intelligence Platform and Practice Database
data.description: In the United States, a new dataset and analytics platform has been launched to aid veterinary operators, investors, and vendors in monitoring practice ownership, market trends, and M&A activity. This searchable and continuously updated platform based in Dallas offers valuable insights into the animal health industry. It provides crucial information for stakeholders, covering a wide range of data points and statistics regarding the sector. This platform, called The Bird Bath, aims to enhance decision-making processes and facilitate a better understanding of the market landscape. The platform's launch in April 21, 2026, marks a significant development in the industry, offering real-time data and analysis for users to stay informed and competitive.

data.title: Tax Season Means Fake W-2 and W-9 Scams Warns eMazzanti Technologies President Carl Mazzanti
data.description: In Hoboken, N.J., on April 21, 2026, it was reported that despite the recent passing of the April 15 tax deadline, Cybercriminals are actively carrying out an influx of payroll and vendor fraud schemes by utilizing fake W-2 and W-9 forms. As per the latest FBI Internet Crime Report, losses from Cybercrime incidents involving such scams are on the rise.

data.title: Express Wash Concepts Celebrates Leadership, Performance and Community Impact at 2026 Washy Awards
data.description: Express Wash Concepts (EWC) recently held a two-day Leadership Summit in Columbus, Ohio, bringing together team members, industry partners, and award winners. The summit took place on April 21, 2026, amidst EWC's impressive growth and philanthropic efforts. The company has recorded over $755,000 in charitable contributions. EWC stands out as a rapidly expanding and highly esteemed express car wash brand in the nation.

data.title: Hamachi.ai Brings fpPathfinder Planning Intelligence Into Its AI Command Center
data.description: An AI-powered Wealth Intelligence Platform, Hamachi.ai, has partnered with fpPathfinder to provide financial planning expertise to investment advisors and asset managers. The integration will offer context-aware and compliant guidance within advisor workflows via the Hamachi Command Center. This collaboration ensures that advisors have access to reliable financial planning resources at their fingertips for more informed decision-making.

data.title: Huron Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Webcast
data.description: Chicago-based company Huron (NASDAQ: HURN) is set to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026, after the market closes on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The conference call led by CEO C. Mark Hussey and CFO John D. Kelly will take place on the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time (4:00 p.m. Central Time). The call will be broadcasted online.

data.title: Supermicro to Report Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results on May 5th, 2026
data.description: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI), a leading total solution provider for AI, Enterprise, Storage, and 5G/Edge technologies, will conduct a conference call to discuss its third-quarter fiscal 2026 financial results on Tuesday, May 5th, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. ET / 2:00 p.m. PT. The webcast can be accessed at https://ir.supermicro.com. For those unable to attend, a replay will be posted on the same website shortly after the call.

data.title: AcuityMD Lands $80 Million in New Funding to Fuel AI Innovation in Medical Device (MedTech) Industry
data.description: In Boston, AcuityMD, a leading AI platform for MedTech, has secured a substantial $80 million in new funding to enhance its platform with advanced AI features. The primary goal is to expedite the uptake of medical technology. This funding, part of the Series C round, was primarily backed by StepStone Group, along with participation from Benchmark, Redpoint Ventures, ICONIQ, and Atreides Management. Currently, AcuityMD supports 16 out of the top 20 MedTech companies.

data.title: XRP holders see gains with potential for 55% rise to $2.24, requiring price to stay above $1.40.
data.description: A large majority of XRP investors have seen their investments recover, raising the possibility of a surge to $2.24. However, for this to happen, buyers need to maintain the price above $1.40.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rallies On Surprise Retail Data; UnitedHealth Surges On Earnings (Live Coverage)
data.description: The Dow Jones index experienced a notable increase today following the unexpected rise in retail sales figures. The market also eagerly anticipates the upcoming Kevin Warsh hearing. UnitedHealth saw a significant surge in stock value. The day's developments point to a positive trend in the stock market, with the Dow Jones rallying on the surprise retail data and UnitedHealth's remarkable earnings boosting investor confidence.
New regions of Russia should reach the national living standard by 2030 - Putin

data.title: Forum Investment Group Selected for Envestnet UMA Platform Interval Fund Lineup, Featuring Forum Real Estate Income Fund (FORAX)
data.description: Denver-based Forum Investment Group revealed today that its Forum Real Estate Income Fund (FORAX) has been chosen to join Envestnet’s Unified Managed Account (UMA) platform. This move positions Forum as one of the exclusive asset managers featured in Envestnet’s extended interval fund initiative, allowing financial advisors to integrate alternative investment approaches into UMA portfolios along with ETFs, mutual funds, and separately managed accounts. This development signifies a significant opportunity for growth and diversification within Envestnet’s platform, broadening the investment options available to advisors and their clients.
